voices.author: KittenML
voices.description: KittenTTS Nano, English (fp16). An ultra-compact model built for on-device, low-latency synthesis — small enough to bundle and run comfortably on mid-range phones.
voices.title: Kitten (8 speakers)

voices.author: hexgrad
voices.description: Kokoro v0.19, English. An 82M-parameter StyleTTS2-based model with multiple built-in speaker styles and natural prosody. The original English-only Kokoro release.
voices.title: Kokoro (11 speakers)

voices.author: hexgrad
voices.description: Kokoro v1.0, multilingual. Covers English plus several additional languages from a single 82M model, with dozens of voice styles. A strong default for apps that need more than one language.
voices.title: Kokoro (53 speakers)

voices.author: hexgrad
voices.description: Kokoro v1.1, multilingual. The latest Kokoro release — refreshed voice styles and broader language coverage over v1.0 while keeping the same compact 82M footprint.
voices.title: Kokoro (103 speakers)

voices.author: Shivam Mehta et al.
voices.description: Matcha-TTS trained on LJSpeech (US English). A flow-matching acoustic model paired with a HiFi-GAN vocoder, giving high-quality single-speaker output at a modest model size.
voices.title: Ljspeech

voices.author: k2-fsa
voices.description: Pocket TTS (int8). A compact zero-shot voice-cloning model tuned for mobile, English. Clones a target voice from a brief reference sample and runs entirely on-device.
voices.title: Speaker_0

voices.author: Supertone
voices.description: Supertonic 3 (int8), multilingual. A high-quality voice covering 30+ languages from one model. Note: released under CC-BY-NC — non-commercial use only; do not ship in a paid or ad-supported product without a separate license from Supertone.
voices.title: Supertonic (10 speakers)

voices.author: k2-fsa
voices.description: ZipVoice distilled (int8), Chinese + English. A flow-matching zero-shot voice-cloning model: supply a short reference clip and it speaks new text in that voice. The distilled int8 build trades a little quality for speed and size.
voices.title: Speaker_0

voices.author: Rhasspy / Mike Hansen
voices.description: Male British English Piper voice at medium quality. Standard southern UK accent; a dependable default for en-GB content.
voices.title: Alan

voices.author: Rhasspy / Mike Hansen
voices.description: Female British English Piper voice at high quality. Smooth, articulate delivery — a top pick for en-GB audiobooks.
voices.title: Cori

voices.author: Rhasspy / Mike Hansen
voices.description: Female British English Piper voice (Jenny / Dioco) at medium quality. Natural, friendly tone with a contemporary UK accent.
voices.title: Jenny_dioco

voices.author: Rhasspy / Mike Hansen
voices.description: Male British English Piper voice with a northern English accent at medium quality. Adds regional variety to the en-GB set.
voices.title: Northern_english_male

voices.author: Rhasspy / Mike Hansen
voices.description: Bundled out of the box. Female US English voice trained on the LJSpeech corpus. Sub-second synthesis on a 2020+ phone — a safe starting point for read-aloud apps.
voices.title: Amy

voices.author: Rhasspy / Mike Hansen
voices.description: Female US English Piper voice at medium quality. The higher-fidelity sibling of the bundled Amy voice, with smoother prosody.
voices.title: Amy

voices.author: Rhasspy / Mike Hansen
voices.description: Female US English character voice at high quality, modelled on the synthetic-sounding GLaDOS persona. A novelty / character voice rather than a neutral narrator.
voices.title: Glados

voices.author: Rhasspy / Mike Hansen
voices.description: Female US English Piper voice from the HiFi-Captain corpus. Crisp, studio-recorded source audio gives it a clean, broadcast-like quality. The HiFi-Captain training corpus is CC-BY-NC-SA — the MIT-licensed weights are fine to ship, but verify the dataset terms before any commercial use.
voices.title: Hfc_female

voices.author: Rhasspy / Mike Hansen
voices.description: Male US English Piper voice from the HiFi-Captain corpus. A clean, broadcast-style male counterpart to hfc_female. The HiFi-Captain corpus is CC-BY-NC-SA; the MIT-licensed weights ship fine but verify the dataset terms before any commercial use.
voices.title: Hfc_male

voices.author: Rhasspy / Mike Hansen
voices.description: Male US English Piper voice at medium quality. Warm, conversational tone that suits assistant-style read-aloud.
voices.title: Joe

voices.author: Rhasspy / Mike Hansen
voices.description: Female US English Piper voice at medium quality. Bright, friendly delivery.
voices.title: Kristin

voices.author: Rhasspy / Mike Hansen
voices.description: Male US English Piper voice at medium quality. Even, neutral read that works well for informational content.
voices.title: Kusal

voices.author: Rhasspy / Mike Hansen
voices.description: Female US English Piper voice trained on the Lessac corpus. A neutral, professional tone; the base many other English Piper voices fine-tune from.
voices.title: Lessac

voices.author: Rhasspy / Mike Hansen
voices.description: Multi-speaker US English Piper voice trained on LibriTTS-R (900+ speakers). Pick a speaker id to switch voices; useful when you want variety from a single download.
voices.title: Piper (904 speakers)

voices.author: Rhasspy / Mike Hansen
voices.description: Male US English Piper voice at high quality. Clear, even delivery — one of the most popular Piper voices for long-form reading.
voices.title: Ryan
